name: Striim Streaming Data Integration API
what_it_does: Enterprise streaming data integration platform with REST API — enabling organizations to build real-time CDC pipelines from databases (Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SAP) to cloud data warehouses and streaming platforms (Snowflake, BigQuery, Kafka, Azure Event Hubs), with a proprietary streaming SQL language (SQML) for in-flight transformations and real-time data validation.
use_cases: Streaming Oracle CDC via Striim for real-time data warehouse replication with LogMiner integration
Migrating SQL Server to cloud via Striim real-time pipeline for zero-downtime database migration
Transforming streaming data via Striim SQML for in-flight data enrichment and validation
Building event-driven pipelines via Striim for Kafka/Event Hub streaming integration
Monitoring streaming pipelines via Striim REST API for throughput and latency observability
not_for: Batch/scheduled ELT (use Fivetran/Airbyte for non-real-time requirements)
Small teams without Oracle/SAP enterprise database expertise
Teams needing open-source self-hosted CDC without licensing costs
best_when: An enterprise needs real-time CDC from Oracle, SQL Server, or SAP databases to cloud destinations — especially for database migration or zero-downtime upgrades where Debezium's enterprise source support is insufficient.
avoid_when: You have modern open-source databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and can use Debezium or Artie, or need a no-code low-cost CDC solution.

auth.notes: HTTP Basic auth (username:password) or API key token. REST API at {striim-host}:9080/api/ for self-hosted or managed Striim Cloud endpoints. Striim Cloud: managed SaaS with separate cloud API. Self-hosted: Striim server runs on your infrastructure with admin/user accounts. Role-based access control: admin, read-only, operator roles. Application (pipeline) concept: Striim calls pipelines 'applications' written in SQML. Striim Cloud on AWS/Azure/GCP: managed option avoids self-hosted complexity.

pricing.paid_tiers: Striim Cloud: usage-based per GB; Self-hosted: perpetual or annual license; Enterprise: custom
pricing.notes: US company (Sunnyvale, CA). Founded 2012 by Alok Pareek and Steve Wilkes (Oracle veterans). $50M+ funding. Enterprise focus: Oracle LogMiner, SQL Server CDC, SAP integration — strong legacy DB support. SQML: streaming SQL language for in-flight data transformation (SELECT/WHERE/JOIN on streams). Striim Cloud: fully managed on AWS/Azure/GCP. Applications: Striim calls pipelines 'applications' — TQL (Transformation Query Language) scripts. Pre-built templates: Oracle Golden Gate migration, SQL Server migration, etc. Used by: large enterprises migrating from on-premises Oracle/SQL Server to cloud.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Basic auth or token. Self-hosted server URL required. SQML/TQL language for pipeline config. Enterprise Oracle/SAP focus. Striim Cloud managed option. US company Sunnyvale. SOC2/GDPR. Annual contracts.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: CDC pipelines are inherently idempotent via log sequence numbers. Application start/stop: check state before modifying. REST API reads idempotent. Pipeline restart: Striim resumes from last checkpoint.
known_agent_gotchas: Self-hosted URL required: REST API at {your-striim-host}:9080/api/ — no public cloud API without Striim Cloud
Applications not pipelines: Striim calls data pipelines 'applications' written in TQL/SQML — learn the terminology
Oracle prerequisites: requires Oracle LogMiner enabled and Striim user with DBA-level log mining permissions
SQL Server prerequisites: requires SQL Server Agent enabled and CDC enabled on source tables
SQML language: in-flight transformations use Striim's own streaming SQL dialect — not standard SQL
Striim Cloud vs self-hosted: REST API endpoints differ — Striim Cloud has its own API surface

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS for Striim Cloud; self-hosted TLS is operator responsibility. Basic auth or token. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Oracle LogMiner: requires privileged DB access — carefully scope permissions. Self-hosted: operator controls all security. RBAC: admin/read-only/operator roles limit blast radius. Striim Cloud: credentials stored in Striim's managed environment — verify data handling practices.
